_comment: Surface (I) per-level curation (W2.E8.T2; the exit-demo level, outdoor snow). Token ids + routing choices only -- no ROM data, committable. Top-5 hue-ID heroes (RemasterFX=0 pin, coverage): tok1267 28.2% (tiled snow ground), tok1263 15.5% (bright snow bank), tok1200 5.2% / tok1201 4.2% / tok1199 2.0% (thin 64x17 dark tree/cliff bands on the hillsides -> ride the automatic whole_image AI-upscale tree; they are dark ~95 luma, NOT snow). The pink/orange sunset sky is a separate skyRender backdrop, not a hero token. tok2228 is pinned seam_safe to match dam's global curation (shared pack, global token ids). 2026-07-10: both snow heroes re-curated procedural->cc0_import (ambientCG Snow010A, CC0): A/B close-ups showed the photo material reads cleaner than the W2.E5.T1 snow synth (whose bank rendition mottles like dirt speckle), and cc0_import is Tier A1 (distributable) where tone=match synth was B. Built manually via tools/texpack/cc0_import.py (build_pack.py defers cc0_import); commands recorded per-token below. See docs/design/remaster-aaa/02-hd-asset-pipeline.md sec 4.2/4.7.

tok1267._note: Surface snow ground (hero #1, 64x32 fmt=4 I-format tileable=1 room, avgRGB bcbcbc). Build with cc0_import.py using size+args verbatim. mean 188 = the committed avgRGB (not ROM stats). highpass keeps the photo tile-uniform across the big tiled snowfield; i_alpha re-attaches the I-format intensity-as-alpha coupling (the loader's stbi path would otherwise force alpha=255). Tier derives from license (CC0 -> A1).

tok1263._note: Surface bright snow bank/slope (hero #2, 32x32 fmt=2 CI tileable=0 room, avgRGB dadae0 ~218,218,225 -- bright white snow, not the pink sky). Build with cc0_import.py using size+args verbatim. Non-tileable so no highpass needed; CI format keeps opaque alpha. Contrast 0.8 tames the photo's relief so the bank reads as clean bright snow. Tier derives from license (CC0 -> A1).

tok2228._note: Curation correction, harmonized with dam.json (global token, shared pack). A tileable=1 non-'room' token; the auto tree routes it whole_image, which fails validate_pack's seam self-check. Pin seam_safe so the HD tile still wraps and both levels' builds agree.
